mcqs.question: What is the primary characteristic of the client-server model?
mcqs.explanation: The client-server model separates the presentation layer (client) from the data storage and processing layer (server).

mcqs.question: What is the purpose of the HTTP GET request method?

options.text: To send data to the server
To retrieve data from the server
To update an existing resource on the server
To delete a resource from the server

mcqs.explanation: The HTTP GET request method is used to retrieve data from the server.

mcqs.question: What is the primary function of a web browser?
mcqs.explanation: The primary function of a web browser is to display web pages.

mcqs.question: What is the difference between a one-tier architecture and a two-tier architecture?

options.text: One-tier architecture has a single machine, while two-tier architecture has multiple machines
One-tier architecture has multiple machines, while two-tier architecture has a single machine
One-tier architecture is more scalable, while two-tier architecture is less scalable
One-tier architecture is less scalable, while two-tier architecture is more scalable

mcqs.explanation: One-tier architecture has a single machine, while two-tier architecture has multiple machines.

mcqs.question: What is the purpose of the HTTP response status code 404?
mcqs.explanation: The HTTP response status code 404 indicates a client error, specifically that the requested resource was not found.
